name: colony
description: 20 agents founding a settlement in uncharted territory. Resources are scarce, cooperation is survival.
opening_events: A group of settlers arrives at an uncharted territory. They have limited supplies and must build a new life together.
The land is fertile but dangerous. Wild animals roam the perimeter. Winter is coming.

agents.name: Ada
agents.goal: build a thriving settlement

agents.goal: protect the colony from threats

agents.goal: unite the settlers through diplomacy
